message:
fix(tests): use scroll_offset() instead of selected for page scroll assertions

The page scroll interaction tests were asserting against `panes[0].selected`
which tracks the selected item index, not the actual scroll position. This
caused false negatives when scrolling behavior was correct but the selection
index didn't change in the expected direction.

Switch to `results_list_state.borrow().scroll_offset()` which directly
measures the viewport scroll position — the actual behavior being tested.
Also update assertion labels from "selection" to "scroll" for clarity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
